---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the use case. What are you trying to do that you can't today?

## Proposed Solution

How you'd like it to work. Include example trigger phrases and expected output.

**Example interaction:**

```
User: "..."
DJ:   "..."
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Data Sources

What Apple Music API endpoints would this use? (Check `references/api-reference.md`)

- [ ] User data (recently played, library, ratings, etc.)
- [ ] Catalog data (search, charts, artist info, etc.)
- [ ] Replay data (annual summaries)
- [ ] New endpoint not currently used

## Scope

- [ ] New script
- [ ] Enhancement to existing script
- [ ] New playlist strategy
- [ ] New engagement feature
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
